ington state exhibit at the Louisiana

Interest is developing through the

tages at the st. Louis worlds fair.
The state appropriation Of $75.00O
Will be supplemented by county and
city appropriations. All the more
populous counties, especially those
DESTROYS of attracting immigration.
have appointed committees and have
made appropriations ranging from
S250D to $4,000.
